Uses of Class
ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Player

  • Uses of Player in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8

    Methods in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8 with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Coin.collect(Player player)
    Marks the coin as collected and updates the player's coin count.
    void
    Food.collect(Player player)
    Marks the food item as collected and applies the health bonus to the player.
    abstract BufferedImage
    Direction.getSprite(Player p)
    Abstract method to get the correct animated sprite frame for the current direction.
    void
    Trap.trigger(Player player)
    Triggers the trap, disarming it and applying damage to the given player.
